tEn: Large Batch Optimization for Deep Learning: Training BERT in 76 minutes
tZh: 大规模批量优化用于深度学习：76分钟训练BERT
sEn: LAMB optimizer enables BERT training in 76 minutes with large batch sizes up to 32868.
sZh: LAMB优化器支持高达32868的大批量大小，将BERT训练时间从3天缩短至76分钟。
absEn: Training large deep neural networks on massive datasets is computationally very challenging. There has been recent surge in interest in using large batch stochastic optimization methods to tackle this issue. The most prominent algorithm in this line of research is LARS, which by employing layerwise adaptive learning rates trains ResNet on ImageNet in a few minutes. However, LARS performs poorly for attention models like BERT, indicating that its performance gains are not consistent across tasks. In this paper, we first study a principled layerwise adaptation strategy to accelerate training of deep neural networks using large mini-batches. Using this strategy, we develop a new layerwise adaptive large batch optimization technique called LAMB; we then provide convergence analysis of LAMB as well as LARS, showing convergence to a stationary point in general nonconvex settings. Our empirical results demonstrate the superior performance of LAMB across various tasks such as BERT and ResNet-50 training with very little hyperparameter tuning. In particular, for BERT training, our optimizer enables use of very large batch sizes of 32868 without any degradation of performance. By increasing the batch size to the memory limit of a TPUv3 Pod, BERT training time can be reduced from 3 days to just 76 minutes (Table 1). The LAMB implementation is available at https://github.com/tensorflow/addons/blob/master/tensorflow_addons/optimizers/lamb.py
absZh: 在庞大数据集上训练大型深度神经网络在计算上极具挑战性。最近，使用大批量随机优化方法来解决这一问题引起了广泛关注。该研究领域最著名的算法是LARS，它通过逐层自适应学习率在几分钟内训练了ImageNet上的ResNet。然而，LARS在像BERT这样的注意力模型上表现不佳，表明其性能提升在不同任务上并不一致。在本文中，我们首先研究了一种原则性的逐层自适应策略，以加速使用大批量训练深度神经网络。利用这一策略，我们开发了一种新的逐层自适应大批量优化技术，称为LAMB；然后我们提供了LAMB以及LARS的收敛性分析，证明了在一般非凸设置下收敛到稳定点。我们的实证结果表明，LAMB在各种任务（如BERT和ResNet-50训练）中表现出优越的性能，且几乎不需要超参数调整。特别是，在BERT训练中，我们的优化器能够使用高达32868的极大批量大小而不会降低性能。通过将批量大小增加到TPUv3 Pod的内存限制，BERT训练时间可以从3天减少到仅76分钟（表1）。LAMB实现可在https://github.com/tensorflow/addons/blob/master/tensorflow_addons/optimizers/lamb.py获取。

contrib.en: Proposes LAMB optimizer with layerwise adaptive learning rates for large-batch training.
contrib.zh: 提出LAMB优化器，采用逐层自适应学习率进行大批量训练。

contrib.en: Provides convergence analysis for LAMB and LARS in nonconvex settings.
contrib.zh: 在非凸设置下为LAMB和LARS提供收敛性分析。

contrib.en: Reduces BERT training time from 3 days to 76 minutes using batch size up to 64K.
contrib.zh: 使用高达64K的批量大小，将BERT训练时间从3天减少到76分钟。

contrib.en: Demonstrates LAMB achieves state-of-the-art accuracy on ResNet-50 with large batches.
contrib.zh: 证明LAMB在大批量下对ResNet-50达到最先进精度。

contrib.en: Shows LAMB outperforms LARS and AdamW on BERT and ResNet-50 tasks.
contrib.zh: 显示LAMB在BERT和ResNet-50任务上优于LARS和AdamW。

contrib.en: Introduces mixed-batch training with re-warm-up for stable large-batch optimization.
contrib.zh: 引入混合批量训练与重新预热，实现稳定的大批量优化。

limits.en: Convergence analysis assumes bounded gradients and smoothness per layer.
limits.zh: 收敛性分析假设每层梯度有界且光滑。

limits.en: Empirical results limited to BERT and ResNet-50; generalizability to other models unverified.
limits.zh: 实证结果仅限于BERT和ResNet-50，对其他模型的泛化性未验证。

limits.en: LAMB requires minimal tuning but optimal hyperparameters may vary across tasks.
limits.zh: LAMB需要极少调参，但最优超参数可能因任务而异。

limits.en: Large batch training requires significant hardware resources like TPUv3 Pod.
limits.zh: 大批量训练需要大量硬件资源，如TPUv3 Pod。

limits.en: Theoretical analysis simplified with β1=0 and λ=0; general case not fully covered.
limits.zh: 理论分析简化了β1=0和λ=0的情况，未完全覆盖一般情况。

items.en: Training large deep neural networks on massive datasets is computationally very challenging. There has been recent surge in interest in using large batch stochastic optimization methods to tackle this issue. The most prominent algorithm in this line of research is Lars, which by employing layerwise adaptive learning rates trains ResNet on ImageNet in a few minutes. However, Lars performs poorly for attention models like Bert, indicating that its performance gains are not consistent across tasks. In this paper, we first study a principled layerwise adaptation strategy to accelerate training of deep neural networks using large mini-batches. Using this strategy, we develop a new layerwise adaptive large batch optimization technique called Lamb; we then provide convergence analysis of Lamb as well as Lars, showing convergence to a stationary point in general nonconvex settings. Our empirical results demonstrate the superior performance of Lamb across various tasks such as Bert and ResNet-50 training with very little hyperparameter tuning. In particular, for Bert training, our optimizer enables use of very large batch sizes of 32868 without any degradation of performance. By increasing the batch size to the memory limit of a TPUv3 Pod, Bert training time can be reduced from 3 days to just 76 minutes (Table 1). The Lamb implementation is available online111https://github.com/tensorflow/addons/blob/master/tensorflow_addons/optimizers/lamb.py.
items.zh: 在大型数据集上训练大型深度神经网络在计算上极具挑战性。最近，使用大批量随机优化方法来解决这一问题引起了广泛关注。这一研究方向中最著名的算法是Lars，它通过采用逐层自适应学习率，在几分钟内就在ImageNet上训练了ResNet。然而，Lars在像Bert这样的注意力模型上表现不佳，表明其性能提升在不同任务上并不一致。在本文中，我们首先研究了一种原则性的逐层自适应策略，以加速使用大批量训练深度神经网络。利用这一策略，我们开发了一种新的逐层自适应大批量优化技术，称为Lamb；然后我们提供了Lamb以及Lars的收敛性分析，证明在一般非凸设置下收敛到稳定点。我们的实证结果表明，Lamb在各种任务（如Bert和ResNet-50训练）中具有优越的性能，且几乎不需要超参数调整。特别是，对于Bert训练，我们的优化器能够使用高达32868的极大批量大小而不会出现性能下降。通过将批量大小增加到TPUv3 Pod的内存限制，Bert训练时间可以从3天减少到仅76分钟（表1）。Lamb的实现可在网上获取。

items.en: With the advent of large scale datasets, training large deep neural networks, even using computationally efficient optimization methods like Stochastic gradient descent (Sgd)Sgd(\textsc{Sgd}), has become particularly challenging. For instance, training state-of-the-art deep learning models like Bert and ResNet-50 takes 3 days on 16 TPUv3 chips and 29 hours on 8 Tesla P100 gpus respectively (Devlin et al., 2018; He et al., 2016). Thus, there is a growing interest to develop optimization solutions to tackle this critical issue. The goal of this paper is to investigate and develop optimization techniques to accelerate training large deep neural networks, mostly focusing on approaches based on variants of Sgd.
items.zh: 随着大规模数据集的出现，即使使用像随机梯度下降（Sgd）这样计算高效的优化方法，训练大型深度神经网络也变得特别具有挑战性。例如，训练像Bert和ResNet-50这样的最先进深度学习模型分别需要16个TPUv3芯片上3天和8个Tesla P100 GPU上29小时（Devlin等人，2018；He等人，2016）。因此，人们越来越关注开发优化解决方案来解决这一关键问题。本文旨在研究和开发加速训练大型深度神经网络的优化技术，主要关注基于Sgd变体的方法。

items.en: Methods based on Sgd iteratively update the parameters of the model by moving them in a scaled (negative) direction of the gradient calculated on a minibatch. However, Sgd’s scalability is limited by its inherent sequential nature. Owing to this limitation, traditional approaches to improve Sgd training time in the context of deep learning largely resort to distributed asynchronous setup (Dean et al., 2012; Recht et al., 2011). However, the implicit staleness introduced due to the asynchrony limits the parallelization of the approach, often leading to degraded performance. The feasibility of computing gradient on large minibatches in parallel due to recent hardware advances has seen the resurgence of simply using synchronous Sgd with large minibatches as an alternative to asynchronous Sgd. However, naïvely increasing the batch size typically results in degradation of generalization performance and reduces computational benefits (Goyal et al., 2017).
items.zh: 基于Sgd的方法通过将模型参数沿小批量上计算的梯度缩放（负）方向移动来迭代更新。然而，Sgd的可扩展性受其固有的顺序性质限制。由于这一限制，在深度学习背景下改进Sgd训练时间的传统方法主要依赖于分布式异步设置（Dean等人，2012；Recht等人，2011）。然而，异步引入的隐式陈旧性限制了该方法的并行化，通常导致性能下降。由于近期硬件进步，可以在大批量上并行计算梯度，这促使人们重新使用带有大批量的同步Sgd作为异步Sgd的替代方案。然而，简单地增加批量大小通常会导致泛化性能下降并减少计算收益（Goyal等人，2017）。

items.en: Synchronous Sgd on large minibatches benefits from reduced variance of the stochastic gradients used in Sgd. This allows one to use much larger learning rates in Sgd, typically of the order square root of the minibatch size. Surprisingly, recent works have demonstrated that up to certain minibatch sizes, linear scaling of the learning rate with minibatch size can be used to further speed up the training Goyal et al. (2017). These works also elucidate two interesting aspects to enable the use of linear scaling in large batch synchronous Sgd: (i) linear scaling of learning rate is harmful during the initial phase; thus, a hand-tuned warmup strategy of slowly increasing the learning rate needs to be used initially, and (ii) linear scaling of learning rate can be detrimental beyond a certain batch size. Using these tricks, Goyal et al. (2017) was able to drastically reduce the training time of ResNet-50 model from 29 hours to 1 hour using a batch size of 8192. While these works demonstrate the feasibility of this strategy for reducing the wall time for training large deep neural networks, they also highlight the need for an adaptive learning rate mechanism for large batch learning.
items.zh: 大批量上的同步Sgd受益于Sgd中使用的随机梯度方差减小。这使得可以在Sgd中使用更大的学习率，通常与批量大小的平方根成正比。令人惊讶的是，最近的研究表明，在一定的批量大小范围内，可以使用学习率与批量大小的线性缩放来进一步加速训练（Goyal等人，2017）。这些工作还阐明了在大批量同步Sgd中启用线性缩放的两个有趣方面：（i）在初始阶段线性缩放学习率是有害的；因此，需要最初使用手动调整的预热策略，缓慢增加学习率；（ii）超过一定批量大小后，线性缩放学习率可能有害。利用这些技巧，Goyal等人（2017）成功地将ResNet-50模型的训练时间从29小时大幅减少到1小时，批量大小为8192。虽然这些工作证明了该策略在减少训练大型深度神经网络墙钟时间方面的可行性，但它们也强调了大批量学习需要自适应学习率机制。

items.en: Variants of Sgd using layerwise adaptive learning rates have been recently proposed to address this problem. The most successful in this line of research is the Lars algorithm (You et al., 2017), which was initially proposed for training ResNet. Using Lars, ResNet-50 can be trained on ImageNet in just a few minutes! However, it has been observed that its performance gains are not consistent across tasks. For instance, Lars performs poorly for attention models like Bert. Furthermore, theoretical understanding of the adaptation employed in Lars is largely missing. To this end, we study and develop new approaches specially catered to the large batch setting of our interest.
items.zh: 最近提出了使用逐层自适应学习率的Sgd变体来解决这个问题。这一研究方向中最成功的是Lars算法（You等人，2017），最初用于训练ResNet。使用Lars，ResNet-50可以在ImageNet上仅用几分钟训练完成！然而，已经观察到其性能提升在不同任务上并不一致。例如，Lars在像Bert这样的注意力模型上表现不佳。此外，对Lars中采用的自适应机制的理论理解在很大程度上缺失。为此，我们研究并开发了专门针对我们感兴趣的大批量设置的新方法。

items.en: Contributions. More specifically, we make the following main contributions in this paper.
items.zh: 贡献。更具体地说，我们在本文中做出以下主要贡献。

items.en: Inspired by Lars, we investigate a general adaptation strategy specially catered to large batch learning and provide intuition for the strategy.
items.zh: 受Lars启发，我们研究了一种专门针对大批量学习的通用自适应策略，并提供了该策略的直觉。

items.en: Based on the adaptation strategy, we develop a new optimization algorithm (Lamb) for achieving adaptivity of learning rate in Sgd. Furthermore, we provide convergence analysis for both Lars and Lamb to achieve a stationary point in nonconvex settings. We highlight the benefits of using these methods for large batch settings.
items.zh: 基于该自适应策略，我们开发了一种新的优化算法（Lamb），用于实现Sgd中学习率的自适应性。此外，我们提供了Lars和Lamb在非凸设置下收敛到稳定点的收敛性分析。我们强调了这些方法在大批量设置中的优势。

items.en: We demonstrate the strong empirical performance of Lamb across several challenging tasks. Using Lamb we scale the batch size in training Bert to more than 32k without degrading the performance; thereby, cutting the time down from 3 days to 76 minutes. Ours is the first work to reduce Bert training wall time to less than couple of hours.
items.zh: 我们展示了Lamb在多个具有挑战性的任务上的强大实证性能。使用Lamb，我们将Bert训练的批量大小扩展到超过32k而不会降低性能；从而将时间从3天减少到76分钟。我们是第一个将Bert训练墙钟时间减少到几小时以下的工作。

items.en: We also demonstrate the efficiency of Lamb for training state-of-the-art image classification models like ResNet. To the best of our knowledge, ours is first adaptive solver that can achieve state-of-the-art accuracy for ResNet-50 as adaptive solvers like Adam fail to obtain the accuracy of Sgd with momentum for these tasks.
items.zh: 我们还展示了Lamb在训练最先进的图像分类模型（如ResNet）方面的效率。据我们所知，我们是第一个能够为ResNet-50实现最先进精度的自适应求解器，因为像Adam这样的自适应求解器在这些任务上无法达到带有动量的Sgd的精度。

items.en: The literature on optimization for machine learning is vast and hence, we restrict our attention to the most relevant works here. Earlier works on large batch optimization for machine learning mostly focused on convex models, benefiting by a factor of square root of batch size using appropriately large learning rate. Similar results can be shown for nonconvex settings wherein using larger minibatches improves the convergence to stationary points; albeit at the cost of extra computation. However, several important concerns were raised with respect to generalization and computational performance in large batch nonconvex settings. It was observed that training with extremely large batch was difficult (Keskar et al., 2016; Hoffer et al., 2017). Thus, several prior works carefully hand-tune training hyper-parameters, like learning rate and momentum, to avoid degradation of generalization performance (Goyal et al., 2017; Li, 2017; You et al., 2018; Shallue et al., 2018).
items.zh: 机器学习优化的文献非常广泛，因此我们在此只关注最相关的工作。早期关于大批量优化的机器学习工作主要集中在凸模型上，通过适当使用较大的学习率，受益于批量大小的平方根因子。对于非凸设置，可以显示类似的结果，即使用更大的小批量可以改善到稳定点的收敛；尽管以额外计算为代价。然而，在大批量非凸设置中，关于泛化和计算性能提出了几个重要问题。已经观察到，使用极大批量训练是困难的（Keskar等人，2016；Hoffer等人，2017）。因此，一些先前的工作仔细手动调整训练超参数，如学习率和动量，以避免泛化性能下降（Goyal等人，2017；Li，2017；You等人，2018；Shallue等人，2018）。

items.en: (Krizhevsky, 2014) empirically found that simply scaling the learning rate linearly with respect to batch size works better up to certain batch sizes. To avoid optimization instability due to linear scaling of learning rate, Goyal et al. (2017) proposed a highly hand-tuned learning rate which involves a warm-up strategy that gradually increases the LR to a larger value and then switching to the regular LR policy (e.g. exponential or polynomial decay). Using LR warm-up and linear scaling, Goyal et al. (2017) managed to train ResNet-50 with batch size 8192 without loss in generalization performance. However, empirical study (Shallue et al., 2018) shows that learning rate scaling heuristics with the batch size do not hold across all problems or across all batch sizes.
items.zh: （Krizhevsky，2014）经验发现，简单地将学习率与批量大小线性缩放，在一定的批量大小范围内效果更好。为了避免由于学习率线性缩放导致的优化不稳定性，Goyal等人（2017）提出了一种高度手动调整的学习率，其中包括一个预热策略，逐渐将学习率增加到较大值，然后切换到常规学习率策略（例如指数或多项式衰减）。使用学习率预热和线性缩放，Goyal等人（2017）成功地在批量大小为8192的情况下训练了ResNet-50，且没有损失泛化性能。然而，实证研究（Shallue等人，2018）表明，学习率缩放启发式方法并不适用于所有问题或所有批量大小。

items.en: More recently, to reduce hand-tuning of hyperparameters, adaptive learning rates for large batch training garnered significant interests. Several recent works successfully scaled the batch size to large values using adaptive learning rates without degrading the performance, thereby, finishing ResNet-50 training on ImageNet in a few minutes (You et al., 2018; Iandola et al., 2016; Codreanu et al., 2017; Akiba et al., 2017; Jia et al., 2018; Smith et al., 2017; Martens & Grosse, 2015; Devarakonda et al., 2017; Mikami et al., 2018; Osawa et al., 2018; You et al., 2019; Yamazaki et al., 2019). To the best of our knowledge, the fastest training result for ResNet-50 on ImageNet is due to Ying et al. (2018), who achieve 76+% top-1 accuracy. By using the Lars optimizer and scaling the batch size to 32K on a TPUv3 Pod, Ying et al. (2018) was able to train ResNet-50 on ImageNet in 2.2 minutes. However, it was empirically observed that none of these performance gains hold in other tasks such as BERT training (see Section 4).
items.zh: 最近，为了减少超参数的手动调整，大批量训练的自适应学习率引起了广泛兴趣。几项近期工作成功地将批量大小扩展到较大值，使用自适应学习率而不降低性能，从而在几分钟内完成了ImageNet上的ResNet-50训练（You等人，2018；Iandola等人，2016；Codreanu等人，2017；Akiba等人，2017；Jia等人，2018；Smith等人，2017；Martens & Grosse，2015；Devarakonda等人，2017；Mikami等人，2018；Osawa等人，2018；You等人，2019；Yamazaki等人，2019）。据我们所知，ImageNet上ResNet-50最快的训练结果来自Ying等人（2018），他们达到了76+%的top-1准确率。通过使用Lars优化器并将批量大小扩展到32K，在TPUv3 Pod上，Ying等人（2018）能够在2.2分钟内训练ImageNet上的ResNet-50。然而，经验观察到，这些性能提升在其他任务（如BERT训练）中均不成立（见第4节）。

items.en: However, tuning the learning rate ηtsubscript𝜂𝑡\eta_{t} in Sgd, especially in large batch settings, is difficult in practice. Furthermore, the dependence on L∞subscript𝐿L_{\infty} (the maximum of smoothness across dimension) can lead to significantly slow convergence. In the next section, we discuss algorithms to circumvent this issue.
items.zh: 然而，在实践中，调整 Sgd 中的学习率 η_t，尤其是在大批量设置下，是困难的。此外，对 L_∞（各维度光滑度的最大值）的依赖可能导致收敛速度显著变慢。在下一节中，我们将讨论规避此问题的算法。

items.en: In this section, we first discuss a general strategy to adapt the learning rate in large batch settings. Using this strategy, we discuss two specific algorithms in the later part of the section. Since our primary focus is on deep learning, our discussion is centered around training a hℎh-layer neural network.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们首先讨论一种在大批量设置下自适应调整学习率的通用策略。利用该策略，我们在本节后半部分讨论两种具体算法。由于我们的主要关注点是深度学习，因此讨论围绕训练一个 h 层神经网络展开。

items.en: Suppose the base algorithm 𝒜𝒜\mathcal{A} is Sgd, then the modification results in the following update rule:
items.zh: 假设基础算法 A 是 Sgd，那么修改后的更新规则如下：

items.en: for all layers i∈[h]𝑖delimited-[]ℎi\in[h] and where xt(i)subscriptsuperscript𝑥𝑖𝑡x^{(i)}_{t} and gt(i)subscriptsuperscript𝑔𝑖𝑡g^{(i)}_{t} are the parameters and the gradients of the ithsuperscript𝑖thi^{\text{th}} layer at time step t𝑡t. The normalization modification is similar to one typically used in normalized gradient descent except that it is done layerwise. Note that the modification leads to a biased gradient update; however, in large-batch settings, it can be shown that this bias is small. It is intuitive that such a normalization provides robustness to exploding gradients (where the gradient can be arbitrarily large) and plateaus (where the gradient can be arbitrarily small). Normalization of this form essentially ignores the size of the gradient and is particularly useful in large batch settings where the direction of the gradient is largely preserved.
items.zh: 对于所有层 i ∈ [h]，其中 x_t^(i) 和 g_t^(i) 分别是第 i 层在时间步 t 的参数和梯度。归一化修改类似于归一化梯度下降中常用的方法，区别在于这里是逐层进行的。注意，这种修改会导致梯度更新有偏；然而，在大批量设置下，可以证明这种偏差很小。直观上，这种归一化对梯度爆炸（梯度可能任意大）和平台期（梯度可能任意小）具有鲁棒性。这种形式的归一化本质上忽略了梯度的大小，在梯度方向基本保持不变的大批量设置中尤其有用。

items.en: The scaling term involving ϕitalic-ϕ\phi ensures that the norm of the update is of the same order as that of the parameter. We found that this typically ensures faster convergence in deep neural networks. In practice, we observed that a simple function of ϕ​(z)=min⁡{max⁡{z,γl},γu}italic-ϕ𝑧𝑧subscript𝛾𝑙subscript𝛾𝑢\phi(z)=\min\{\max\{z,\gamma_{l}\},\gamma_{u}\} works well. It is instructive to consider the case where ϕ​(z)=zitalic-ϕ𝑧𝑧\phi(z)=z. In this scenario, the overall change in the learning rate is ‖xt(i)‖‖gt(i)‖normsuperscriptsubscript𝑥𝑡𝑖normsuperscriptsubscript𝑔𝑡𝑖\tfrac{\|x_{t}^{(i)}\|}{\|g_{t}^{(i)}\|} , which can also be interpreted as an estimate on the inverse of Lipschitz constant of the gradient (see equation 2). We now discuss different instantiations of the strategy discussed above. In particular, we focus on two algorithms: Lars (3.1) and the proposed method, Lamb (3.2).

items.en: The first instantiation of the general strategy is Lars algorithm (You et al., 2017), which is obtained by using momentum optimizer as the base algorithm 𝒜𝒜\mathcal{A} in the framework. Lars was earlier proposed for large batch learning for ResNet on ImageNet. In general, it is observed that the using (heavy-ball) momentum, one can reduce the variance in the stochastic gradients at the cost of little bias. The pseudocode for Lars is provide in Algorithm 1.
items.zh: 通用策略的第一个实例化是 Lars 算法（You 等人，2017），它通过在该框架中使用动量优化器作为基础算法 A 得到。Lars 先前被提出用于 ImageNet 上 ResNet 的大批量学习。通常观察到，使用（重球）动量可以在引入少量偏差的情况下降低随机梯度的方差。Lars 的伪代码在算法 1 中给出。

items.en: The second instantiation of the general strategy is obtained by using Adam as the base algorithm 𝒜𝒜\mathcal{A}. Adam optimizer is popular in deep learning community and has shown to have good performance for training state-of-the-art language models like Bert. Unlike Lars, the adaptivity of Lamb is two-fold: (i) per dimension normalization with respect to the square root of the second moment used in Adam and (ii) layerwise normalization obtained due to layerwise adaptivity. The pseudocode for Lamb is provided in Algorithm 2. When β1=0subscript𝛽10\beta_{1}=0 and β2=0subscript𝛽20\beta_{2}=0, the algorithm reduces to be Sign Sgd where the learning rate is scaled by square root of the layer dimension (Bernstein et al., 2018).
items.zh: 通用策略的第二个实例化是通过使用 Adam 作为基础算法 A 得到的。Adam 优化器在深度学习社区中很流行，并已被证明在训练像 Bert 这样的最先进语言模型方面具有良好的性能。与 Lars 不同，Lamb 的自适应性是双重的：（i）相对于 Adam 中使用的二阶矩平方根的逐维度归一化，以及（ii）由于逐层自适应性而获得的逐层归一化。Lamb 的伪代码在算法 2 中给出。当 β_1=0 且 β_2=0 时，该算法退化为符号 Sgd，其中学习率按层维度的平方根缩放（Bernstein 等人，2018）。

items.en: Discussion on convergence rates. We first start our discussion with the comparison of convergence rate of Lars with that of Sgd (Theorem 1). The convergence rates of Lars and Sgd differ in two ways: (1) the convergence criterion is (𝔼​[∑i=1h‖∇if‖])2superscript𝔼delimited-[]superscriptsubscript𝑖1ℎnormsubscript∇𝑖𝑓2(\mathbb{E}[\sum_{i=1}^{h}\|\nabla_{i}f\|])^{2} as opposed to 𝔼​[‖∇f‖2]𝔼delimited-[]superscriptnorm∇𝑓2\mathbb{E}[\|\nabla f\|^{2}] in Sgd and (2) the dependence on L𝐿L and σ𝜎\sigma in the convergence rate. Briefly, the convergence rate of Lars is better than Sgd when the gradient is denser than curvature and stochasticity. This convergence rate comparison is similar in spirit to the one obtained in (Bernstein et al., 2018). Assuming that the convergence criterion in Theorem 1 and Theorem 2 is of similar order (which happens when gradients are fairly dense), convergence rate of Lars and Lamb depend on La​v​gsubscript𝐿𝑎𝑣𝑔L_{avg} instead of L∞subscript𝐿L_{\infty} and are thus, significantly better than that of Sgd. A more quantitative comparison is provided in Section C of the Appendix. The comparison of Lamb (with β2subscript𝛽2\beta_{2} = 0) with Sgd is along similar lines. We obtain slightly worse rates for the case where β2>0subscript𝛽20\beta_{2}>0; although, we believe that its behavior should be better than the case β2=0subscript𝛽20\beta_{2}=0. We leave this investigation to future work.
items.zh: 关于收敛速率的讨论。我们首先比较Lars与Sgd的收敛速率（定理1）。Lars和Sgd的收敛速率在两方面存在差异：(1) 收敛准则为 (𝔼[∑_{i=1}^h ‖∇_i f‖])^2，而Sgd中为 𝔼[‖∇f‖^2]；(2) 收敛速率对 L 和 σ 的依赖不同。简而言之，当梯度比曲率和随机性更密集时，Lars的收敛速率优于Sgd。这种收敛速率比较在本质上与(Bernstein et al., 2018)中得到的结论相似。假设定理1和定理2中的收敛准则具有相似的阶数（当梯度相当密集时成立），则Lars和Lamb的收敛速率依赖于 L_avg 而非 L_∞，因此显著优于Sgd。更定量的比较见附录C节。Lamb（β_2=0）与Sgd的比较类似。对于β_2>0的情况，我们得到了稍差的速率；尽管我们相信其行为应优于β_2=0的情况。我们将此研究留待未来工作。

items.en: We now present empirical results comparing Lamb with existing optimizers on two important large batch training tasks: Bert and ResNet-50 training. We also compare Lamb with existing optimizers for small batch size (<1​Kabsent1𝐾<1K) and small dataset (e.g. CIFAR, MNIST) (see Appendix).
items.zh: 我们现在展示Lamb与现有优化器在两个重要的大批量训练任务（Bert和ResNet-50训练）上的实证结果。我们还比较了Lamb与现有优化器在小批量（<1K）和小数据集（如CIFAR、MNIST）上的表现（见附录）。

items.en: Experimental Setup. To demonstrate its robustness, we use very minimal hyperparameter tuning for the Lamb optimizer. Thus, it is possible to achieve better results by further tuning the hyperparameters. The parameters β1subscript𝛽1\beta_{1} and β2subscript𝛽2\beta_{2} in Algorithm 2 are set to 0.90.90.9 and 0.9990.9990.999 respectively in all our experiments; we only tune the learning rate. We use a polynomially decaying learning rate of ηt=η0×(1−t/T)subscript𝜂𝑡subscript𝜂01𝑡𝑇\eta_{t}=\eta_{0}\times(1-t/T) in Algorithm 2), which is the same as in Bert baseline. This setting also works for all other applications in this paper. Furthermore, for Bert and ResNet-50 training, we did not tune the hyperparameters of Lamb while increasing the batch size. We use the square root of LR scaling rule to automatically adjust learning rate and linear-epoch warmup scheduling. We use TPUv3 in all the experiments. A TPUv3 Pod has 1024 chips and can provide more than 100 petaflops performance for mixed precision computing. To make sure we are comparing with solid baselines, we use grid search to tune the hyper-parameters for Adam, Adagrad, AdamW (Adam with weight decay), and Lars. We also tune weight decay for AdamW. All the hyperparameter tuning settings are reported in the Appendix. Due to space constraints, several experimental details are relegated to the Appendix.
items.zh: 实验设置。为展示其鲁棒性，我们对Lamb优化器使用了极少的超参数调优。因此，通过进一步调整超参数可以获得更好的结果。算法2中的参数β_1和β_2在所有实验中分别设置为0.9和0.999；我们仅调整学习率。我们使用多项式衰减学习率 η_t=η_0×(1−t/T)（算法2中），与Bert基线相同。此设置也适用于本文所有其他应用。此外，对于Bert和ResNet-50训练，我们在增加批量大小时未调整Lamb的超参数。我们使用LR缩放规则的平方根来自动调整学习率，并采用线性周期预热调度。所有实验均使用TPUv3。一个TPUv3 Pod有1024个芯片，可为混合精度计算提供超过100 petaflops的性能。为确保与可靠基线比较，我们使用网格搜索调整Adam、Adagrad、AdamW（带权重衰减的Adam）和Lars的超参数。我们还调整了AdamW的权重衰减。所有超参数调优设置见附录。由于篇幅限制，部分实验细节移至附录。

items.en: We first discuss empirical results for speeding up Bert training. For this experiment, we use the same dataset as Devlin et al. (2018), which is a concatenation of Wikipedia and BooksCorpus with 2.5B and 800M words respectively. We specifically focus on the SQuAD task222https://rajpurkar.github.io/SQuAD-explorer/ in this paper. The F1 score on SQuAD-v1 is used as the accuracy metric in our experiments. All our comparisons are with respect to the baseline Bert model by Devlin et al. (2018). To train Bert, Devlin et al. (2018) first train the model for 900k iterations using a sequence length of 128 and then switch to a sequence length of 512 for the last 100k iterations. This results in a training time of around 3 days on 16 TPUv3 chips. The baseline Bert model333Pre-trained BERT model can be downloaded from https://github.com/google-research/bert achieves a F1 score of 90.395. To ensure a fair comparison, we follow the same SQuAD fine-tune procedure of Devlin et al. (2018) without modifying any configuration (including number of epochs and hyperparameters). As noted earlier, we could get even better results by changing the fine-tune configuration. For instance, by just slightly changing the learning rate in the fine-tune stage, we can obtain a higher F1 score of 91.688 for the batch size of 16K using Lamb. We report a F1 score of 91.345 in Table 1, which is the score obtained for the untuned version. Below we describe two different training choices for training Bert and discuss the corresponding speedups.
items.zh: 我们首先讨论加速Bert训练的实证结果。本实验使用与Devlin et al. (2018)相同的数据集，即维基百科和BooksCorpus的拼接，分别包含2.5B和800M个词。本文特别关注SQuAD任务222https://rajpurkar.github.io/SQuAD-explorer/。实验中以SQuAD-v1上的F1分数作为准确率指标。所有比较均针对Devlin et al. (2018)的基线Bert模型。为训练Bert，Devlin et al. (2018)首先使用序列长度128训练模型900k次迭代，然后在最后100k次迭代切换到序列长度512。这导致在16个TPUv3芯片上训练时间约为3天。基线Bert模型333预训练BERT模型可从https://github.com/google-research/bert下载达到90.395的F1分数。为确保公平比较，我们遵循Devlin et al. (2018)的相同SQuAD微调流程，不修改任何配置（包括迭代次数和超参数）。如前所述，通过更改微调配置我们可以获得更好的结果。例如，仅通过略微改变微调阶段的学习率，使用Lamb在批量大小16K下即可获得91.688的更高F1分数。我们在表1中报告了91.345的F1分数，这是未调优版本获得的分数。下面我们描述训练Bert的两种不同选择，并讨论相应的加速效果。

items.en: For the first choice, we maintain the same training procedure as the baseline except for changing the training optimizer to Lamb. We run with the same number of epochs as the baseline but with batch size scaled from 512 to 32K. The choice of 32K batch size (with sequence length 512) is mainly due to memory limits of TPU Pod. Our results are shown in Table 1. By using the Lamb optimizer, we are able to achieve a F1 score of 91.460 in 15625 iterations for a batch size of 32768 (14063 iterations for sequence length 128 and 1562 iterations for sequence length 512). With 32K batch size, we reduce Bert training time from 3 days to around 100 minutes. We achieved 49.1 times speedup by 64 times computational resources (76.7% efficiency). We consider the speedup is great because we use the synchronous data-parallelism. There is a communication overhead coming from transferring of the gradients over the interconnect. For ResNet-50, researchers are able to achieve 90% scaling efficiency because ResNet-50 has much fewer parameters (# parameters is equal to #gradients) than Bert (25 million versus 300 million).
items.zh: 对于第一种选择，我们保持与基线相同的训练流程，仅将训练优化器改为Lamb。我们使用与基线相同的迭代次数，但批量大小从512扩展到32K。选择32K批量大小（序列长度512）主要是由于TPU Pod的内存限制。结果如表1所示。使用Lamb优化器，我们在批量大小32768下经过15625次迭代（序列长度128时14063次迭代，序列长度512时1562次迭代）获得了91.460的F1分数。使用32K批量大小，我们将Bert训练时间从3天减少到约100分钟。我们通过64倍的计算资源实现了49.1倍的加速（76.7%效率）。我们认为加速效果很好，因为我们使用了同步数据并行。梯度在互连上的传输存在通信开销。对于ResNet-50，研究人员能够实现90%的缩放效率，因为ResNet-50的参数数量（#参数等于#梯度）远少于Bert（2500万对3亿）。

items.en: To obtain further improvements, we use the Mixed-Batch Training procedure with Lamb. Recall that Bert training involves two stages: the first 9/10 of the total epochs use a sequence length of 128, while the last 1/10 of the total epochs use a sequence length of 512. For the second stage training, which involves a longer sequence length, due to memory limits, a maximum batch size of only 32768 can be used on a TPUv3 Pod. However, we can potentially use a larger batch size for the first stage because of a shorter sequence length. In particular, the batch size can be increased to 131072 for the first stage. However, we did not observe any speedup by increasing the batch size from 65536 to 131072 for the first stage, thus, we restrict the batch size to 65536 for this stage. By using this strategy, we are able to make full utilization of the hardware resources throughout the training procedure. Increasing the batch size is able to warm-up and stabilize the optimization process (Smith et al., 2017), but decreasing the batch size brings chaos to the optimization process and can cause divergence. In our experiments, we found a technique that is useful to stabilize the second stage optimization. Because we switched to a different optimization problem, it is necessary to re-warm-up the optimization. Instead of decaying the learning rate at the second stage, we ramp up the learning rate from zero again in the second stage (re-warm-up). As with the first stage, we decay the learning rate after the re-warm-up phase. With this method, we only need 8599 iterations and finish Bert training in 76 minutes (100.2% efficiency).
items.zh: 为进一步改进，我们使用Lamb结合混合批量训练流程。回顾一下，Bert训练包括两个阶段：前9/10的总迭代次数使用序列长度128，后1/10的总迭代次数使用序列长度512。对于第二阶段训练（涉及更长的序列长度），由于内存限制，在TPUv3 Pod上最大批量大小仅为32768。然而，由于第一阶段序列长度较短，我们可以使用更大的批量大小。具体来说，第一阶段的批量大小可以增加到131072。然而，我们并未观察到将批量大小从65536增加到131072带来任何加速，因此我们将该阶段的批量大小限制为65536。通过此策略，我们能够在整个训练过程中充分利用硬件资源。增加批量大小有助于预热和稳定优化过程（Smith et al., 2017），但减少批量大小会给优化过程带来混乱并可能导致发散。在我们的实验中，我们发现一种有助于稳定第二阶段优化的技术。由于我们切换到了不同的优化问题，有必要重新预热优化。我们不在第二阶段衰减学习率，而是从零开始再次增加学习率（重新预热）。与第一阶段一样，我们在重新预热阶段后衰减学习率。使用此方法，我们仅需8599次迭代，在76分钟内完成Bert训练（100.2%效率）。

items.en: To ensure that our approach is compared to a solid baseline for the Bert training, we tried three different strategies for tuning AdamW: (1) AdamW with default hyperparameters (see Devlin et al. (2018)) (2) AdamW with the same hyperparameters as Lamb, and (3) AdamW with tuned hyperparameters. AdamW stops scaling at the batch size of 16K because it is not able to achieve the target F1 score (88.1 vs 90.4). The tuning information of AdamW is shown in the Appendix. For 64K/32K mixed-batch training, even after extensive tuning of the hyperparameters, we fail to get any reasonable result with AdamW optimizer. We conclude that AdamW does not work well in large-batch Bert training or is at least hard to tune. We also observe that Lamb performs better than Lars for all batch sizes (see Table 2).
items.zh: 为确保我们的方法与Bert训练的可靠基线进行比较，我们尝试了三种不同的AdamW调优策略：(1) 使用默认超参数的AdamW（见Devlin et al. (2018)）；(2) 使用与Lamb相同超参数的AdamW；(3) 使用调优后超参数的AdamW。AdamW在批量大小16K时停止缩放，因为它无法达到目标F1分数（88.1对90.4）。AdamW的调优信息见附录。对于64K/32K混合批量训练，即使经过广泛的超参数调优，我们也未能使用AdamW优化器获得任何合理结果。我们得出结论，AdamW在大批量Bert训练中效果不佳，或至少难以调优。我们还观察到，对于所有批量大小，Lamb的表现均优于Lars（见表2）。

items.en: ImageNet training with ResNet-50 is an industry standard metric that is being used in MLPerf444https://mlperf.org/. The baseline can get 76.3% top-1 accuracy in 90 epochs (Goyal et al., 2017). All the successful implementations are based on momentum SGD (He et al., 2016; Goyal et al., 2017) or Lars optimizer (Ying et al., 2018; Jia et al., 2018; Mikami et al., 2018; You et al., 2018; Yamazaki et al., 2019). Before our study, we did not find any paper reporting a state-of-the-art accuracy achieved by Adam, Adagrad, or AdamW optimizer. In our experiments, even with comprehensive hyper-parameter tuning, Adagrad/Adam/AdamW (with batch size 16K) only achieves 55.38%/66.04%/67.27% top-1 accuracy. After adding learning rate scheme of Goyal et al. (2017), the top-1 accuracy of Adagrad/Adam/AdamW was improved to 72.0%/73.48%/73.07%. However, they are still much lower than 76.3%. The details of the tuning information are in the Appendix. Table 3 shows that Lamb can achieve the target accuracy. Beyond a batch size of 8K, Lamb’s accuracy is higher than the momentum. Lamb’s accuracy is also slightly better than Lars. At a batch size of 32K, Lamb achieves 76.4% top-1 accuracy while Lars achieves 76.3%. At a batch size of 2K, Lamb is able to achieve 77.11% top-1 accuracy while Lars achieves 76.6%.
items.zh: 使用ResNet-50进行ImageNet训练是MLPerf444https://mlperf.org/中使用的行业标准指标。基线可在90个迭代周期内达到76.3%的top-1准确率（Goyal et al., 2017）。所有成功的实现均基于动量SGD（He et al., 2016; Goyal et al., 2017）或Lars优化器（Ying et al., 2018; Jia et al., 2018; Mikami et al., 2018; You et al., 2018; Yamazaki et al., 2019）。在我们的研究之前，我们未发现任何论文报告使用Adam、Adagrad或AdamW优化器达到最先进准确率。在我们的实验中，即使经过全面的超参数调优，Adagrad/Adam/AdamW（批量大小16K）仅达到55.38%/66.04%/67.27%的top-1准确率。在添加Goyal et al. (2017)的学习率方案后，Adagrad/Adam/AdamW的top-1准确率提升至72.0%/73.48%/73.07%。然而，它们仍远低于76.3%。调优信息详见附录。表3显示Lamb可以达到目标准确率。在批量大小超过8K时，Lamb的准确率高于动量。Lamb的准确率也略高于Lars。在批量大小32K时，Lamb达到76.4%的top-1准确率，而Lars达到76.3%。在批量大小2K时，Lamb达到77.11%的top-1准确率，而Lars达到76.6%。

full.sec: 4.3 Hyperparameters for scaling the batch size

items.en: For Bert and ImageNet training, we did not tune the hyperparameters of Lamb optimizer when increasing the batch size. We use the square root LR scaling rule and linear-epoch warmup scheduling to automatically adjust learning rate. The details can be found in Tables 4 and 5
items.zh: 对于Bert和ImageNet训练，我们在增加批量大小时未调整Lamb优化器的超参数。我们使用LR缩放规则的平方根和线性周期预热调度来自动调整学习率。详细信息见表4和表5。

items.en: Large batch techniques are critical to speeding up deep neural network training. In this paper, we propose the Lamb optimizer, which supports adaptive elementwise updating and layerwise learning rates. Furthermore, Lamb is a general purpose optimizer that works for both small and large batches. We also provided theoretical analysis for the Lamb optimizer, highlighting the cases where it performs better than standard Sgd. Lamb achieves a better performance than existing optimizers for a wide range of applications. By using Lamb, we are able to scale the batch size of Bert pre-training to 64K without losing accuracy, thereby, reducing the Bert training time from 3 days to around 76 minutes. Lamb is also the first large batch adaptive solver that can achieve state-of-the-art accuracy on ImageNet training with ResNet-50.
items.zh: 大批量技术对于加速深度神经网络训练至关重要。本文提出了Lamb优化器，它支持自适应元素级更新和逐层学习率。此外，Lamb是一种通用优化器，适用于小批量和大批量。我们还为Lamb优化器提供了理论分析，突出了其优于标准Sgd的情况。Lamb在广泛的应用中实现了比现有优化器更好的性能。通过使用Lamb，我们能够将Bert预训练的批量大小扩展到64K而不损失准确率，从而将Bert训练时间从3天减少到约76分钟。Lamb也是第一个能够在ImageNet训练中使用ResNet-50达到最先进准确率的大批量自适应求解器。

items.zh: 我们感谢George Dahl和Jeff Dean的评论。感谢Michael Banfield、Dehao Chen、Youlong Cheng、Sameer Kumar和Zak Stone对TPU Pod的支持。
